args.code: (()=>{const a=[...document.querySelectorAll('a')].find(x=>(x.href||'').includes('B0CZ7F61XN')); if(!a)return JSON.stringify({ok:false,reason:'amazon_link_not_found'}); let n=a; for(let i=0;i<8&&n;i++,n=n.parentElement){const html=(n.outerHTML||'').slice(0,3000); if(/167487|edit|productId|id/.test(html)) return JSON.stringify({ok:true,level:i,html});} return JSON.stringify({ok:false,reason:'id_not_found'});})()
